title: Bonus: Advanced Python
description: Pythonic patterns — comprehensions, decorators, context managers.

drills.content:
with open('data.json') as f:
    items = json.load(f)
    active = [x for x in items if x.get('active')]

by_id = {item['id']: item for item in items}
results = sorted(by_id.values(), key=lambda x: x['score'], reverse=True)
